item.title:
Meet Binance Chat, your new crypto social hub 💬
Chat with friends, share trade insights, and send c...
item.description:
Meet Binance Chat, your new crypto social hub 💬
Chat with friends, share trade insights, and send crypto, all in one place.
Simple. Secure. Social.
Try it now 👉 https://t.co/tDaBVCikKS https://t.co/rhdAVxS281
--- @binance | ❤️ 7 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 104
item.author: @binance

item.title:
Capable agents are the result of co-evolution between models and harnesses.
We've been working wit...
item.description:
Capable agents are the result of co-evolution between models and harnesses.
We've been working with @NousResearch to ensure that M2.7 x Hermes Agent provides a top-tier experience for users. Hermes’s self-improving loop brings out the best in M2.7 through real usage.
We are also launching MaxHermes, a cloud-hosted and managed version of Hermes in @MiniMaxAgent (No terminal setup, no config)
If you’re already running Hermes locally, you can now give you agent a partner in the cloud with MaxHermes.
The path to AGI is shorter with good company. @NousResearch 🤝 @MiniMax_AI
--- @MiniMax_AI | ❤️ 34 | 🔁 1 | 💬 2 | 👁 875
item.author: @MiniMax_AI

item.title: Your post isn't a banger unless it's been stolen.
item.author: @coinbase

item.title: 观猹网的朋友邀请我写一篇 ColaOS 的主创说 我把 Cola 的故事和内测获得的感受到写了进去 大家如果有观猹网账号的话，欢迎去点评一波 ColaOS 哈，感谢大家 如果你还没有 Cola 的邀请...
item.description:
观猹网的朋友邀请我写一篇 ColaOS 的主创说 我把 Cola 的故事和内测获得的感受到写了进去 大家如果有观猹网账号的话，欢迎去点评一波 ColaOS 哈，感谢大家 如果你还没有 Cola 的邀请码，请私信我你的 waitlist 注册邮箱，也许会随机掉落 https://t.co/kxT3WV61yN https://t.co/9N3DPgpC09
--- @oran_ge | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 844
item.author: @oran_ge
